Minimum suggested crew size:
Capacitor units: two linemen and one ground man H-frame: six electricians
Install primary protective devices: four electricians
Install secondary conductors and service Drop #4 and smaller: two electricians
Install secondary conductors and service Drop #2 to #0: two electricians, one equipment operator
Install secondary racks: two electricians
Install transformers on poles: three electricians, one equipment operator

Single cross assembly installation: two electricians.
